romSizeBytes.description: Total ROM size in bytes for this build profile.

ramProfile.description: RDRAM profile (base vs expansion vs custom).

rdramBytes.description: Total RDRAM in bytes available on target hardware.

engineReservedBytes.description: Bytes of RDRAM reserved by engine/runtime and not usable for streamed content.

cpuCyclesPerFrame.description: Estimated CPU cycles per frame budget at target FPS.

texturePoolBytes.description: Total ROM budget in bytes allocated to texture data.

audioPoolBytes.description: Total ROM budget in bytes allocated to audio banks and streams.

scriptPoolBytes.description: Total ROM budget in bytes allocated to scripts and logic data.

dataPoolBytes.description: Total ROM budget in bytes allocated to other structured data (cameras, tables, mission data).

segmentRomBudgets.description: Optional per-segment ROM budgets in bytes (segment name -> max bytes).
